name: discovery
description: Human-Centered Design pack. Evidence-grounded persona panels, synthetic interviews, silence audits, and HMW generation. Adds the DISCOVER capability to the NOMARK lifecycle. Based on IDEO Field Guide to Human-Centered Design (57 methods) with dual-consumer lens (human + AI agent).

agents.description: DISCOVER phase facilitation — persona construction, synthetic interviews, insight extraction
AI agent consumer simulation — discovery, evaluation, transaction, failure testing

commands.description: Run full DISCOVER phase (persona panel + synthetic interviews + insights)
Quick empathy check — Suri test against current Feature
Who is missing from the evidence base?
Generate How Might We variants from insight statements

skills.description: Full Empathy Engine — persona panel construction, evidence harvesting, synthetic interviews
Bias detection — identifies who is missing from evidence and what that means
Bridges insight statements to opportunity questions for both human and agent consumers
Mandatory adversarial persona — breaks sycophancy bias in synthetic interviews

templates.description: Evidence-aware Who It Serves section for SOLUTION.md
Part I.5 Insight Registry template for SOLUTION.md
Individual persona profile template with evidence chain
AI agent consumer persona profile template

token_impact: ~2 agent defs + 4 commands + 4 skills loaded on demand. Skills are invoked, not preloaded. Low passive impact.
